courseTitle: Multiplayer, Networked Play, and Live Operations
title: Social Deduction Microgame
genericDescription: Design trust, suspicion, and information asymmetry; support conversation or signaling; avoid unsolvable randomness.
specificDescription: Build a game for at least three players or simulated roles where hidden roles, secret goals, or partial information drive play. Include moderator-free rules.
gradingRubric: 30 pts deduction structure; 20 pts role balance; 20 pts information design; 15 pts rule clarity; 15 pts playtest notes.
